name: Libre Listener Wallet
description: Non-custodial Bitcoin Lightning wallet. Injects a WebLN (window.webln) provider so any web app can request payments, invoices, and V4V boosts.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; object-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https: wss: ws://127.0.0.1:*
